category_sources: source_facts.description says system info script; official GitHub README says HyFetch is neofetch with pride flags and also provides updated neofetch/neowofetch.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is HyFetch; source_facts.name is hyfetch.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README includes installation, usage, and Q&A; repository has an official docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README contribution section uses the same repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says system info with LGBTQ+ pride flags; official GitHub README says neofetch with pride flags and notes Rust rewrite/install via Cargo.
